rationale: Educ. Code §26.0091 governs school district employee reports of neglect based on refusal of psychiatric treatment of a child. It bears no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: Sec. 26.0091. REFUSAL OF PSYCHIATRIC OR PSYCHOLOGICAL TREATMENT OF CHILD AS BASIS OF REPORT OF NEGLECT.
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption increase and this Education Code provision; rule_text concerns child welfare/psychiatric treatment refusal, not property tax exemptions.
